title: Trump Plans to Fire FDA Commissioner Makary
headline: President Trump has approved a plan to dismiss FDA Commissioner Marty Makary after a stormy 14-month tenure marked by controversy and industry conflict.
key_facts: 14-month tenure, Controversial and stormy period, Plan to dismiss after industry conflict, Multiple media confirmations (WSJ, Bloomberg, Reuters, STAT)

title: FDA Delays Leqembi Subcutaneous Autoinjector
headline: FDA extends its review of Eisai/Biogen's subcutaneous autoinjector formulation of Leqembi (lecanemab), pushing past the May 24 PDUFA date.
key_facts: Leqembi subcutaneous autoinjector delayed past May 24 PDUFA target, Prior PDUFA was May 24 2026, Formulation convenience critical for patient uptake

title: Daiichi Sankyo $1B ADC Manufacturing Loss
headline: Daiichi Sankyo disclosed nearly $1 billion extraordinary loss after overestimating demand for antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) manufacturing capacity.
key_facts: Nearly $1 billion extraordinary loss, ADC manufacturing overcapacity write-down, Overestimated demand for ADC capacity, $610M also cited in some sources

title: Capricor Sues NS Pharma Over Duchenne Drug
headline: Capricor Therapeutics filed lawsuit against partner NS Pharma (Nippon Shinyaku) alleging pricing flaw and deficient launch preparation for Duchenne drug.
key_facts: Lawsuit alleging pricing flaw and launch prep deficiency, FDA decision date looming for Duchenne therapy, Unusual partner litigation before PDUFA

title: Gilead Yeztugo $1B 2026 Sales Projection
headline: Gilead Sciences says long-acting injectable PrEP Yeztugo (lenacapavir) is on track for $1 billion in 2026 sales.
key_facts: $1 billion 2026 sales projection for Yeztugo, Twice-yearly injectable PrEP, Blockbuster launch trajectory, Competitive with ViiV's cabotegravir

title: Odyssey Therapeutics Prices $279M IPO
headline: Odyssey Therapeutics priced an upsized IPO at $279 million on its second attempt, after withdrawing its initial filing in 2025.
key_facts: $279 million IPO proceeds, Upsized offering on second attempt, Nine of 11 biotechs to IPO in 2026 raised $250M+, Most since 2021

title: Artiva Biotherapeutics $300M Raise on RA Data
headline: Artiva Biotherapeutics raised $300 million, buoyed by rheumatoid arthritis clinical data.
key_facts: $300 million financing raise, RA clinical data success, NK cell therapy platform

title: FDA 7th Approval Under CNPV Pilot Program
headline: FDA announced the seventh approval under the Critical Need Priority Voucher (CNPV) pilot program on May 8, 2026.
key_facts: Seventh CNPV approval milestone, CNPV pilot program active, Regulatory incentive program for critical needs

title: Bayer Acquires Perfuse for $2.45B
headline: Bayer agreed to buy Perfuse Therapeutics for up to $2.45 billion, centered on a mid-stage glaucoma therapy.
key_facts: Up to $2.45 billion acquisition, Mid-stage glaucoma therapy, Bayer's first drug company acquisition in years, Potentially largest since AskBio 2020

title: Entrada Duchenne Data Disappoints; Plunge 50%
headline: Entrada Therapeutics shares plunged more than 50% after Phase 1/2 Duchenne muscular dystrophy results fell short of expectations.
key_facts: Phase 1/2 Duchenne data disappointing, Stock dropped >50%, Analysts said data fell short of expectations

title: FDA Pregnancy Safety Data Guidance
headline: FDA issued guidance on pregnancy safety data for drugs and biologics on May 8.
key_facts: FDA guidance on pregnancy safety data requirements for drugs and biologics
